name: Redis MCP
description: Official Redis MCP server for agentic applications to read, write, and search Redis data structures including JSON, hash, set, sorted set, stream, and list types.

skills.name: Redis Read/Write
skills.description: Read and write Redis data types including strings, hashes, lists, sets, sorted sets, and JSON documents via natural language commands.

skills.name: Vector Similarity Search
skills.description: Execute vector similarity searches over Redis vector sets to support semantic retrieval and agent memory lookup workflows.

skills.name: Stream Management
skills.description: Produce and consume from Redis Streams, enabling event-driven agent coordination and audit-log patterns.
